Com festa pronta, Belle Silva reage à ausência de Thiago Silva na Copa
content: A influenciadora Belle Silva , esposa do zagueiro Thiago Silva , 41, realizou uma festa para acompanhar o anúncio de convocados para a Copa do Mundo nesta segunda-feira (18). Apesar da expectativa, o jogador ficou de fora da lista anunciada por Carlo Ancelotti. Nas redes sociais, ela mostrou a mesa posta com comidas, vestiu camisa da Seleção e até colocou um lacinho verde e amarelo na cachorra da família. “Há muitos anos eu não tinha essa sensação de reunir os amigos para esperar uma convocação . Aqui em casa já estamos nos preparativos, com a energia positiva. Se Deus quiser, vai dar certo. Thiago Silva vai estar na Copa 2026 “, disse em um story. Em outro registro, ela mencionou que estava com altas expectativas. “Espero poder ouvir o nome dele e ver Thiago Silva na Copa de 2026. Eu estou um mix de sentimentos, lembrando muito 2010, quando foi a primeira convocação dele, que a gente não sabia e não tinha certeza. A gente tem que se preparar para tudo, para rir e para chorar”, citou. Leia Mais Enquete: você concorda com a convocação de Neymar para a Copa do Mundo? title: Anne Hathaway y su riguroso entrenamiento a los 43 años para el regreso de El diablo viste a la moda
content: Lo que debes saber Anne Hathaway entrena con un método híbrido de 30 minutos basado en pilates y ballet La rutina prioriza la fuerza funcional y la postura para evitar lesiones en el rodaje Emily Blunt y Stanley Tucci comparten el mismo sistema físico de envejecimiento activo A los 43 años, Anne Hathaway se preparó para volver a encarnar a uno de sus personajes más icónicos, Andy Sachs, en la esperada secuela de El diablo viste a la moda ( The Devil Wears Prada 2 ). Para afrontar las exigentes jornadas de rodaje y lograr una transformación física impecable, l a actriz ganadora del Oscar se sometió a un programa de entrenamiento especializado de alta eficiencia. Guayaquil El cantante New Jerson fue arrestado: Detalles de su captura en vía Samborondón Redacción Extra Según revela la revista Women’s Health, Hathaway depositó su confianza en el "Método de Movimiento" diseñado por la reconocida entrenadora británica Monique Eastwood. Este sistema no busca únicamente un resultado estético, sino que prioriza la fuerza funcional, la técnica precisa y el control absoluto del cuerpo para prevenir lesiones y mejorar la presencia escénica de la actriz. En qué consiste el "Método de Movimiento" que unió al elenco El método desarrollado por Eastwood es una disciplina híbrida de 30 minutos por sesión que integra elementos de la danza, el ballet, el pilates y el entrenamiento funcional . La entrenadora, que lleva cuatro años trabajando de la mano con Hathaway, también ha sumado a este régimen a otros miembros clave del reparto original, como Emily Blunt y Stanley Tucci. El entrenamiento de Hathaway está rígidamente estructurado en seis bloques de ejercicios de cuerpo completo que se ejecutan de manera multidirecciona l en ambos lados de la anatomía. La clave del éxito radica en el uso de mancuernas ligeras (de tres a cinco kilogramos) y en anteponer la calidad y la alineación postural antes que la velocidad o el levantamiento de cargas excesivas. La rutina detallada paso a paso: Bloque 1 (movilidad y piernas): inicia con una sentadilla diagonal a una pierna combinada con pliés (movimiento de ballet) y estiramientos frontales, elevando las mancuernas sobre la cabeza para potenciar muslos, glúteos y estabilidad. Bloque 2 (coordinación y core): consiste en una zancada lateral profunda acompañada de elevación de rodilla y movimientos de brazos que simulan el gesto de remo, activando el tronco y las cadenas musculares de forma...

title: Vorcaro é transferido para cela comum na carceragem da PF enquanto aguarda análise de delação
content: A Polícia Federal transferiu internamente o banqueiro Daniel Vorcaro para uma cela comum na carceragem da Superintendência do Distrito Federal. Com isso, ele passa a ser submetido às regras do normativo interno da PF para a visita de advogados. Essas regras permitem duas visitas por dia por um período de meia hora. Antes, ele estava alocado em uma sala de Estado-Maior que havia sido reformada para abrigar o ex-presidente Jair Bolsonaro no cumprimento de sua prisão. Vorcaro ficou no local para trabalhar na sua proposta de delação premiada com seus advogados e passava quase o dia inteiro reunido com eles. A PF já havia solicitado ao ministro do Supremo Tribunal Federal (STF) André Mendonça que Vorcaro fosse transferido de volta para um presídio, sob o argumento de que as condições dele na prisão na Superintendência alteravam e afetavam a rotina da administração. O ministro ainda não proferiu uma decisão sobre essa mudança de endereço, mas autorizou a mudança de celas dentro da PF. Vorcaro está na Superintendência desde o dia 19 de março, quando começou a negociar sua delação premiada. Como a defesa de Vorcaro já entregou sua proposta de colaboração, a PF decidiu aplicar a ele as regras usadas para todos os demais presos e colocá-lo em uma carceragem comum. A Polícia Federal e a Procuradoria-Geral da República (PGR) ainda analisam a proposta apresentada. Como mostrou o Estadão, a tendência é que essa proposta seja devolvida aos advogados com um pedido para complemento dos temas abordados.

Grupo Firme Releases New Music Video in Costa Rica: Arenal Volcano and Natural Beauty Take Center Stage
content: The post Grupo Firme Releases New Music Video in Costa Rica: Arenal Volcano and Natural Beauty Take Center Stage appeared first on The Costa Rica News . Mexican regional music sensations Grupo Firme stun fans with their latest music video, filmed entirely in Costa Rica. Lead singer Eduin Caz shared the production, highlighting the majestic Arenal Volcano. Costa Rica continues to cement its reputation not only as a top global travel destination but also as a premier location for major international music productions. This time, the phenomenally popular Mexican band Grupo Firme chose the country’s breathtaking landscapes to serve as the primary backdrop for their latest musical release. The band’s charismatic frontman, Eduin Caz, shared the newly released video with millions of followers on social media. The production was filmed amidst the lush greenery of the country’s northern region, where the iconic Arenal Volcano completely steals the show. A Visual Tribute to San Carlos and La Fortuna The music video takes full advantage of the scenic richness offered by the San Carlos municipality. Throughout the clip, spectacular cinematography seamlessly blends the energetic performance and distinct style of Mexican regional music with some of Costa Rica’s most celebrated natural wonders: The Arenal Volcano: The majestic, cone-shaped colossus serves as an imposing and beautiful backdrop in several of the video’s key scenes. Thermal Rivers and Tropical Rainforests: The production highlights the rich flora, natural hot springs, and eco-resorts that surround the base of the volcano. Local Hospitality: Band members took to their personal networks during the shoot to praise the warmth and affection shown by Costa Rican locals during their stay. Boosting Costa Rica’s Tourism on the Global Stage For Costa Rica, high-profile music videos like this act as an invaluable showcase. Grupo Firme commands one of the largest and most loyal audiences in Latin music today across platforms like YouTube and Spotify. This means millions of viewers in Mexico, the United States, and South America will be exposed directly to the stunning vistas of La Fortuna de San Carlos . Eduin Caz expressed his deep enthusiasm for the final cut of the project and thanked the Costa Rican people, describing the experience of filming with the Arenal Volcano behind them as truly unmatched. Grupo Firme’s new video is not only a treat for their fanbase but also a fantastic promotional asset for the...

Bell Post Hill and Winchelsea share the points in thriller
content: Bell Post Hill’s resurrection continues with its young squad fighting back in the final term to snatch a tie against Winchelsea with both sides sitting inside the Geelong & District Netball League top five. Winch led by six goals in the final term, but the Panthers lifted and managed to salvage something from a gripping match at Myers Reserve on Saturday 16 May. It was another step forward for Daniel Black’s squad with Bell Post Hill aiming to end its long finals drought. “Four years ago at the Hill we lost by 60 goals against Winch,” Black said. “We’ve put a lot of work in. I keep telling them if they stay in the game for longer, like never quit. The girls are starting to believe in themselves. “It’s a bit of a shame you don’t get the win with the opportunity but again you get two points so that’s something. It’s more about having moments to prove ourselves a little bit.” Black took over at Myers Reserve four years ago and the long-term plan is starting to come to fruition. The Panthers won six games last year and already have four wins and a draw this season. “Everyone is buying in,” Black said. “We’ve had two or three really handy little additions with some experience, Milla Holt, who’s only a kid still, but she’s played a lot of netball and has some experience. “We have Pip Hodge, who’s an experienced midcourter and they’ve just complimented (the side) and they’re just beautiful girls. Culturally they’re the right people. ” An example of embracing Black’s culture is Sharni Van Doren, who came from Lara. Van Doren didn’t want to abandon the Cats and was prepared to stay, but the club wasn’t able to field an A Grade side in the Geelong Netball League this year. “She’s just an amazing cultural fit,” Black said. “Because she knew the state of play at Lara and didn’t want to walk out and that just spoke of her character.” New Winchelsea coach Maddison McKiernan crossed to the GDNL from South Barwon and said she was still getting used to the league. “The hardest part is probably not knowing the teams and the players,” she said. “So when we come up to them, it’s kind of a shock, but I guess the silver lining is there’s no pre-ideas. “I think the biggest thing that Mags (co-coach Maggie Lind) said is, ‘winning isn’t actually something you can just know how to do. You’ve got to learn how to win’. “We did have that lead for most of the game and we struggled to hold on to it. So that’s why we spoke to them after the game. “We just came off our structures, we got...

title: Domestic Weekend Travel Boosts Croatia’s Tourism Picture
content: May the 19th, 2026 – Domestic weekend travel from inland to the coast or indeed the other way around is altering and boosting Croatia’s tourism picture. With more people opting for quick weekends away, more locations that were otherwise largely overlooked are coming to the fore. The aforementioned little change is a very subtle but increasingly noticeable trend across Croatia. The rise of short domestic weekend travel between inland cities and the Adriatic coast is taking hold. Highly improved roads, higher incomes (despite ongoing inflation) and changing lifestyles are encouraging more frequent short trips rather than traditional long summer holidays. the rise of the croatian mini-break Instead of taking one long annual holiday, more people appear to be spreading their travel across multiple shorter trips. Weekend visits from Zagreb, Varaždin, Osijek and inland regions to coastal destinations like Zadar, Šibenik and Istria are becoming more common, especially among younger working adults. This is reshaping demand patterns in accommodation, restaurants and transport outside traditional peak holiday periods. The expansion of Croatia’s internationally praised and extensive motorway network has played a major role in this shift. Journeys that once required half a day or more are now achievable in a mere few hours at most, making spontaneous or frequent coastal visits far more realistic. This has effectively transformed parts of the Adriatic coast into “weekend-accessible” destinations rather than purely seasonal holiday locations. For coastal businesses, this trend creates new opportunities outside the scorching, peak months of July and August. Hotels, private accommodation and restaurants are increasingly able to attract domestic visitors in spring, autumn and even winter weekends. However, in some popular areas, it also adds pressure during already busy periods, especially when domestic and international tourism overlap. a subtle tweak of lifestyle patterns Beyond tourism itself, the trend reflects broader lifestyle changes in Croatia. Higher mobility, flexible work patterns and changing consumer habits are making short travel more normal than in previous generations. Croatia is slowly developing a more continuous tourism flow throughout the year rather than a single concentrated summer season. For God only knows how many decades, Croatia’s tourism industry was defined by extreme seasonality, but the rise of domestic mini-break travel suggests that...

title: El reciclaje: pequeñas acciones para grandes cambios
content: El reciclaje se ha posicionado como uno de los grandes retos del siglo XXI para acabar con el exce­so de residuos y la contaminación. Un acto aparentemente sencillo puede cambiar el rumbo de todo un planeta si se lleva a cabo a través de la colaboración conjunta, no solo de los ciudadanos, sino también de los gobiernos y organizaciones mundiales. Desde 2005, cada 17 de mayo se celebra el Día Mundial del Reciclaje, una idea impulsada por la UNESCO con el fin de promover unos valores sostenibles basados en la reutilización y en la segunda vida para minimizar nuestra huella de carbono, reducir el exceso de residuos y, en general, construir un mundo más estable. A pesar de que la organización no lo implantó como un día oficial al uso, como sí sucede con el Día Mundial de la Paz (21 de septiembre), su iniciativa fue la de marcar en la agenda educativa la promoción de unos valores necesarios para el nuevo siglo que hiciesen frente a la hiperproducción de los últimos años. El reciclaje como solución a un problema estructural En su estudio ‘El reciclaje de plásticos, un reto para conseguir una economía circular’, María José Valarezo Ulloa y Lázaro Ruiz Virgen (Universidad Nacional de Loja, Ecuador), explican que, en los últimos diez años, se ha producido más plástico que en toda la historia de la humanidad, en especial en el plástico... El 73 % de los españoles recicla más a raíz de la pandemia, según informe Los cambios en la vida cotidiana producidos desde el comienzo de la crisis sanitaria han despertado el compro­miso ambiental de los ciudadanos españoles: un 73 % afirma que recicla más que antes de la pandemia mientras que el 48 % ha reducido el consumo energético en el hogar, según revela el informe Green Response Report 2021. El estudio, publicado por Essity Iberia, concluye que la mitad de los ciudadanos en España - 53 % - presta más atención a la sostenibilidad de los productos que consume y considera que disminuir el impacto ambiental es una responsabilidad compartida entre la administración pública, las empresas y la sociedad civil. Además, el 91 % tiene la intención de seguir con este nuevo modo de vivir en beneficio de la sostenibilidad, según el análisis. La pandemia y el confinamiento han generado la incor­poración de prácticas diarias “más respetuosas con el medio ambiente” que, en palabras del country manager en Essity Iberia, José Ramón Iracheta, responde a una “tendencia mundial” consciente de la...

Corte Nacional concede extradición de alias 'Patucho Celso'
content: Las claves que debes saber CNJ concede la extradición de ‘Patucho Celso’ a EE.UU. tras aceptar traslado. El cabecilla de Los Choneros es requerido en Nueva York por narcotráfico; aceptó por garantías. Coordinan traslado desde cárcel El Encuentro. Fue detenido en narcofiesta del 2024. Una semana después de que el procesado aceptó voluntariamente su traslado, el presidente de la Corte Nacional de Justicia (CNJ), Marco Rodríguez, emitió este lunes 18 de mayo de 2026 la sentencia con la cual concede la extradición de Celso Miguel Moreira Heredia, alias 'Patucho Celso', a los Estados Unidos. Te invitamos a leer| Alias DC cayó en Guayaquil: tendría vínculos con Los Choneros y Mafia 18 La Corte informó que Rodríguez extendió el fallo, debido a que Moreira Heredia, conocido como el "cabecilla invisible " de la banda delincuencial Los Choneros, "consintió su extradición, luego de que el estado solicitante presentara las garantías jurisdiccionales correspondientes". Alias 'Patucho Celso' es requerido por un Tribunal de Nueva York para que someterlo a la justicia por los delitos de tráfico internacional de drogas a gran escala y por asociación ilícita. Tras la resolución legal, las autoridades judiciales de Ecuador y EE. UU. coordinarán acciones para que el sospechoso deje la cárcel del Encuentro , en donde está detenido, y sea trasladado al extranjero para continuar con el trámite penal respectivo. Política ¿Cuál es el interés del Gobierno de Ecuador tras la entrega de Álex Saab a Estados Unidos? Martin Pallares Sentencia llega dos años después de narcofiesta La sentencia de la extradición de Moreira Heredia se emite dos años después de que el criminal fuera detenido en la denominada " narcofiesta ", ocurrida en mayo de 2024. Así se conoció a la celebración que reunió a alias 'Patucho' con otros cabecillas criminales en una finca lujosa de vía a la Costa, la cual concluyó con su detención en un gran operativo. Celso Moreira, alias Patucho Celso, fue arrestado en 2024 junto a 32 sospechosos más en la denominada 'narcofiesta', una celebración en una finca lujosa de vía a la Costa. Cortesía Celso Miguel Moreira Heredia es señalado por las autoridades ecuatorianas como el criminal responsable de consolidar la estructura delictiva de Los Choneros desde las sombras, a través de operaciones y alianzas con otros grupos delincuenciales. إدوارد كينواي يكشف عن مشهد جديد في Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced يعمق الصراع الشخصي للشخصية
content: تعود شخصية إدوارد كينواي من لعبة Assassin’s Creed: Black Flag إلى الأضواء من جديد مع إصدار نسخة معاد مزامنتها، والتي تضيف بعداً أعمق لصراعاته الشخصية. الممثل مات رايان، الذي يؤدي دور إدوارد، يشير إلى أن التجربة هذه المرة تحمل مشاهد جديدة تعزز من فهم اللاعب لتطور الشخصية، مما يجعل الرحلة أكثر تأثيراً وأكثر درامية في كل تفاصيلها. تجديد تجربة إدوارد كينواي في Assassin’s Creed: Black Flag يُعد إصدار Assassin’s Creed: Black Flag المعاد مزامنته خطوة مميزة للجماهير التي تحب استكشاف القصص المعقدة والأحداث التاريخية الحية، حيث تقدم Ubisoft رسومات محسنة وعناصر تحكم حديثة تجعل اللعب أكثر سلاسة وتشويقاً، إضافةً إلى محتوى جديد يوسع من قصة العديد من الشخصيات الحاسمة مثل بلاكبيرد وستيدي بونيت. ومن أبرز الإضافات مشهد جديد بين إدوارد وزوجته كارولين، كتبته اليد الأصلية للعبة، داربي ماكديفيت، ليُضفي مزيداً من العمق والتعقيد على علاقة إدوارد والصراع الداخلي الذي يعيشه. مشاهد جديدة تعمق الصراع الداخلي أوضح مات رايان في حوار مع TechRadar Gaming أن تسجيله لمشاهد التقاط حركة جديدة يحمل وزناً ثقيلاً لقصة إدوارد كينواي، حيث تُبرز هذه المشاهد الرحلة النفسية والشخصية التي تبدأ من أنانية ورغبة في الشهرة والثروة، وصولاً إلى إدراك القيم الحقيقية والتغيير الذي يتطلبه النجاح الروحي والأخلاقي. وتُضيف المشاهد الجديدة بعداً خاصاً يسلط الضوء على هذا الصراع الداخلي الذي يُعد مركزياً في تطور الشخصية. عودة بحلة جديدة بعد 14 عاماً تُعد عودة مات رايان للدور بعد أكثر من عشر سنوات تجربة مميزة، حيث وصفها بأنها تشبه ارتداء سترة صديق قديم، مع ضرورة تعديل صوتي طفيف ليعكس نضج الشخصية والزمن الذي مر عليها، مما يشكل جسرًّا بين الماضي والحاضر في مشوار إدوارد. من المقرر أن يتم إطلاق النسخة المعاد مزامنتها يوم 9 يوليو على منصات PS5، Xbox Series X، Series S، والكمبيوتر الشخصي، لتقدم لمحبي السلسلة فرصة لاستعادة المتعة والفهم الأعمق لهذه القصة الخالدة. في ختام الحديث، تقدم Ubisoft تجربة محكمة تجمع بين الجاذبية البصرية وروعة السرد القصصي، مما يجعل Assassin’s Creed: Black Flag المعاد مزامنته تحفة فنية تستحق الاهتمام والمتابعة. عبر هذه الإضافة، يكتسب اللاعبون فرصة فريدة للتعمق في شخصية إدوارد كينواي ومعايشة رحلته التي تجمع بين المغامرة والصراع الأخلاقي، وهو ما يبرز أهمية هذه النسخة الجديدة ضمن مكتبة السلسلة وعالم الألعاب بشكل عام.

MIVHED autoriza reapertura de STD Mall en Manoguayabo, tras rigurosa adecuación estructural
content: La institución verificó que la edificación ahora cumple con estándares de sismorresistencia, garantizando la protección de la vida y la propiedad. Santo Domingo Oeste . – El Ministerio de Vivienda, Hábitat y Edificaciones (MIVHED), a través de su Dirección de Inspección de Obras Privadas, dispuso la reapertura de la plaza comercial STD Mall, ubicada en Manoguayabo, luego de que el establecimiento completara un proceso integral de reforzamiento y cumplimiento de las normativas de construcción vigentes. La edificación había sido clausurada hace ocho meses tras un levantamiento visual y técnico realizado por los inspectores del MIVHED, quienes determinaron que la estructura presentaba altos niveles de vulnerabilidad y no contaba con la licencia de construcción reglamentaria. Durante el período de cierre, la propiedad fue sometida a un profundo esquema de reforzamiento estructural para corregir fallas críticas que ponían en riesgo la integridad física de los usuarios y la propiedad privada. Entre las correcciones principales ejecutadas bajo la supervisión del MIVHED, destacan la eliminación de sobrecarga tras la demolición total de un almacén el segundo nivel, cuya estructura era técnicamente deficiente al nacer directamente sobre la losa del primer nivel sin el debido apoyo de columnas desde la cimentación. También puedes leer: MIVHED segunda fase remozamiento del Hospital Vinicio Asimismo, se realizó un reforzamiento con la instalación de rigidizadores normativos, que son perfiles metálicos que se atornillan en vigas y columnas para fortalecer el esqueleto de la edificación. Además, se implementó un sistema de marcos arriostrados o Brace Frames, diseñados para que la estructura cumpla con los parámetros de desplazamientos y torsiones normativas ante eventos sísmicos. Con estas adecuaciones, el MIVHED verificó que la plaza STD Mall cuenta ahora con un desempeño estructural óptimo para proteger la vida de sus visitantes y empleados ante posibles terremotos o temblores de tierra.

90s Pop Group Announces Retirement Almost 30 Years After Their One-Hit Wonder Song Dominated the Airwaves
content: The end of an era is at hand. Aqua, the 90s pop group most well-known for their one-hit wonder song “Barbie Girl”, is calling it quits. In a post shared on social media, Aqua issued a statement letting fans know they have retired and expressing gratitude for all the years of support. “Dear everyone,” the message began. “After many incredible years, we have decided to close the chapter of AQUA as a live band.” “AQUA has been such a huge part of our lives, and together we’ve had the chance to experience more than we ever dared to dream of,” they continued. “We’ve traveled the world countless times, met so many wonderful people, sung together with millions of you, and shared memories that we will carry with us forever.” The band then went on to add, “When you’ve been together for this long, you also learn when it’s time to protect what you’ve created together. For us, this feels like the right moment to say goodbye, while the memories are still strong, and while the love for the music, the story, and each other remains intact.” Finally, Aqua expressed, “From the bottom of our hearts: thank you to everyone who has been part of this journey over the past 30 years. Thank you for the love, the energy, the support, and for all the moments we’ve shared together. Nothing but love and gratitude from here on.” It should be noted that the group stated that they are closing this “chapter of AQUA as a live band.” This could indicate that they plan to record and release music, but that is unclear at this time. Aqua ended their letter by sending ‘Endless love’ to their fans Aqua was formed in Copenhagen, Denmark, in 1995. The group’s founding members are René Dif, Søren Rasted, Lene Nystrøm, and Claus Norreen. Notably, Noreen exited the group in 2016, after their second reunion. In 1997, Aqua released their debut album, Aquarium , which featured the song “Barbie Girl”. I probably don’t even have to tell you how insanely massive the tune was. Almost instantly it began dominating radio and TV airwaves. The group dropped their follow-up, Aquarius, in 2000. It was a major success internationally, but in the United States, it did not recapture the popularity of their previous album. This same year, the band and their label faced a lawsuit from Mattel over “Barbie Girl”, but ultimately the courts sided against the toy company. After all that, Aqua split in 2001. They reunited in 2007 and released their third and final album, Megalomania , in 2011. The next year, 2012, they...

A future with One Nation
content: Pauline Hanson in Albury on victory night in the Farrer by-election. ‘I want my country back. I want to bring back prosperity.’ As we listen to the strains of Pauline Hanson and her calls about how existing parties have ‘run this country into the ground’ following the One Nation win in the Farrer by-election I have to reflect on how her good mate Donald Trump has made America great again (MAGA). Frustration at the high cost of living, increased fuel prices, a sense that there is a lack of major party response to genuine community concerns, and that it is refreshing to hear someone ‘say it like it is’ has driven the Hanson win in the Farrer by-election. It’s understandable that people who are struggling blame the government, or at least what used to be the two major parties before Abbott, Dutton, Ley and Taylor/Hastie wrecked the Liberals. But why support One Nation? After all, One Nation voted to cut benefits like the aged pension and let the biggest corporations pay less tax. Pauline Hanson has links to Trump and supports the Iran war, even though the ‘battlers’ One Nation professes to care about are hardest hit by the fuel and fertiliser price hikes. Hanson has billionaire backers like Gina Rinehart and she also leads a lavish lifestyle at public expense. Isn’t that the sort of stuff that upsets One Nation voters? We have the chance to reflect on the outcomes in the US of unfettered right-wing, autocratic, and racist government, and it is not good. It has led to mass deportations, including children and babies, and the killing of American citizens by ICE (though as One Nation is not in government this is unlikely at this point in time). It has led to increasing corruption, a reduction in the rights of free speech, attempts to gut education, and the war with Iran that is having devastating consequences on the world economy, including Australia. One Nation, like other right-wing movements such as MAGA, has a simple strategy of blaming it all on the ‘government’, and an ‘out’ group – first Asians, then Muslims, and now we are just going for a catch-all called ‘migrants’. This is the rhetoric of fear, it is the way to split communities and demonise people, it is destruction – not community building. The overwhelming message of One Nation is that ‘there are too many foreigners here, taking our jobs and houses’ and also ‘they don’t want to assimilate’, which is opposite to the actual reality on the ground. title: Monash, Suzhou Park Renew 5-Year Science Partnership
‘El Cruce’ swim to Isla Mujeres attracts over 1,600 swimmers from 21 countries
content: Mexico’s world-renowned open water swimming competition known as El Cruce attracted 1,638 participants from 21 countries over the weekend, but at the end of the day, two local Quintana Roo athletes took home the honors. Fernando Betanzos Rodríguez and María Elena Carreto Castro were crowned men’s and women’s winners of the 10-km competition on Sunday, the main event that took swimmers through the Caribbean Sea from Playa Caracol in Cancún to Isla Mujeres. Patty Kohlmann, a swimmer who competed in two Olympic Games for Mexico, said El Cruce is an “emblematic swim,” a true test of endurance, strategy, and adaptation to ocean currents. (Mara Lezama) Patty Kohlmann, a Mexican former female freestyle and medley swimmer who participated in two consecutive Summer Olympics for Mexico starting in 1984, described El Cruce (the Crossing) as a true test of endurance, strategy and adaptation to ocean currents. “The Cruce competition is a must,” Kohlmann said about the competition on her personal Instagram account. “I believe that all open water swimmers must do it at some point because it’s an emblematic swim. It’s a swim that’s been prestigious for many years.” She’s not alone in her opinion. El Cruce is considered by the World Open Water Swimming Association to be among the 10 most important open water swims in the world due to the physical demands of the course and the natural beauty of the turquoise waters. Swimmers competed in 13 different categories across the competition. In addition to the 10-km swim, a Half Iron Swim (1.9 km) and an Iron Swim (3.8 km) were held on Saturday. Quintana Roo Governor Mara Lezama Espinosa opened the 21 st edition of the competition after a Maya ceremony was held as part of the traditional event. In addition to establishing Quintana Roo as a major sporting destination, El Cruce is a significant economic and tourism driver for the state, attracting athletes, coaches, families and visitors from around the world. Kohlmann said that the competition is particularly difficult because conditions can change dramatically from one day to the next, meaning that you must always be prepared for what might come. She emphasized the importance of the swimmers’ strategy and the ability to adapt their style depending on the conditions. She joined the 10-km competition on Sunday. “It was a spectacular swim... some difficult conditions but always fun,” Kohlmann said when asked about her latest experience. With reports from Reporte Indigo , El Sol de...

Trump’s China Trip Was A Big ‘America First’ Opportunity. Did He Seize It?
content: Last week marked one of the most important events on Donald Trump’s foreign policy calendar. The president sat down in Beijing for a much-anticipated meeting with Chinese leader Xi Jinping. All signs looked positive before the summit, with some commentators comparing it to Richard Nixon’s famous China trip in 1972. We don’t yet have a full readout of how the meeting went, but the president himself indicated that he and Xi discussed, among other weighty subjects, Iran, Taiwan and the global economy. This is encouraging. Trump’s main goal in Beijing was to put America first, and that meant insisting China change its behavior on all three of those issues — forcefully if necessary. Start with the war in Iran. China has made a point of supposedly staying on the sidelines, positioning itself as a peacemaker. The reality is that Beijing has been aiding and abetting the Iranians for months in increasingly bold and dangerous ways. Just last week, China invoked a “blocking statute” to make known it wouldn’t respect U.S. sanctions on Iranian oil that have been imposed since the start of the war. Despite the Strait of Hormuz being closed, Iranian oil exports continue to transit through and an estimated 90% of them go to China. When the oil reaches the Chinese mainland, small plants known as “teapot refineries” process the crude, an economic arrangement even CNN has called a “shadowy network.” That network is being used to enrich the same Iranian regime that’s targeting America’s armed forces. At the summit, he reportedly secured a promise from Xi not to send military equipment to Iran. His administration should watch the situation closely and make sure China is good to his word. The next point for Trump was to stress that China needs to exercise responsibility in its own corner of the globe. China is an emerging global force, but militarily it’s still a regional power. Its armed forces are being modernized to win a hypothetical war in the Indo-Pacific, not on shores far from home. But China is also a deeply irresponsible regional power. Beijing has relentlessly antagonized its powerful neighbor of Japan, cratering Chinese-Japanese relations to their lowest point in more than half a century. Showy military exercises near disputed waters and shadowy influence campaigns have been leveraged against South Korea. Taiwan is under constant threat. What does this have to do with “America first”? The United States has military alliances with both Japan and South Korea ;...

title: Especialistas del IMSS corrigen asimetría facial con tecnología tridimensional
content: Especialistas del Hospital General Regional (HGR) No. 1 “Dr. Carlos Mac Gregor Sánchez Navarro” del Instituto Mexicano del Seguro Social (IMSS), realizaron una exitosa cirugía ortognática de alta complejidad a una paciente que presentaba asimetría facial significativa, alteraciones respiratorias y dolor de columna. A través de una cirugía ortognática, la cual tuvo una duración aproximada de cinco horas, permitió mejorar la oclusión dental, simetría facial y funciones respiratorias de la paciente. El equipo del servicio de Cirugía Maxilofacial realizó el procedimiento mediante un protocolo integral de planeación tridimensional, que permite analizar con precisión la anatomía craneofacial, simular los movimientos quirúrgicos y trasladar la planificación al quirófano, lo que garantiza mayor seguridad, además de resultados funcionales y estéticos. La intervención incluyó osteotomías controladas, es decir, fracturas faciales planificadas, a fin de reposicionar los segmentos óseos, lograr una adecuada oclusión dental y restablecer el equilibrio facial, explicó el doctor Arturo Hernández Paniagua, director del Hospital General Regional No. 1 del Seguro Social. Resaltó que a un mes de la cirugía, la paciente Abigaíl presenta evolución favorable, adecuada simetría facial y mejoría funcional, al tiempo que enfatizó que este tipo de procedimientos de alta especialidad, permiten brindar bienestar integral de los pacientes, al impactar tanto en la funcionalidad como en la apariencia física y contribuir al fortalecimiento de la confianza y la autoestima. “En el IMSS trabajamos para ofrecer resultados que permitan a las personas no solo recuperar su salud, sino también sentirse bien consigo mismas”, afirmó el doctor Arturo Hernández. El doctor José Manuel Sánchez, cirujano maxilofacial del referido hospital general, explicó que la cirugía ortognática tiene como base restablecer la funcionalidad y lograr un perfil facial armónico en pacientes con asimetrías. Detalló que el protocolo de planeación tridimensional permite analizar con precisión la simetría facial, trasladar esta evaluación a modelos digitales y definir con exactitud los movimientos quirúrgicos. A partir de ello, se efectúan osteotomías planificadas para reposicionar los segmentos óseos y alcanzar un equilibrio funcional y estético. Mencionó que a un mes de la intervención, los cambios suelen ser altamente notorios, con beneficios tanto en la función...

Keiko Fujimori invita a López Aliaga, pese que él dijo no tener «nada que hablar» con ella
content: La lideresa de Keiko Fujimori reafirmó este lunes la disposición de Fuerza Popular para conversar con todas las agrupaciones políticas, incluido Renovación Popular, pese a la negativa expresada por su líder, Rafael López Aliaga. Durante una rueda de prensa, la candidata sostuvo que su partido mantiene abiertos los canales de comunicación y remarcó que no descarta acercamientos con ningún sector político. “No estoy negando la posibilidad de diálogo con nadie. Las puertas del diálogo están abiertas para todos. En lo personal he saludado a varios candidatos presidenciales. Los futuros senadores y diputados de nuestro partido ya conversan con otros representantes”, declaró. Aunque evitó revelar detalles sobre eventuales conversaciones con Renovación Popular, señaló que los temas en agenda están relacionados con “la futura agenda del Perú, que tiene que ver con orden, con seguridad, con crecimiento económico, con educación y con salud”. Fujimori también destacó las coincidencias entre diversas agrupaciones políticas y reiteró su invitación al exalcalde de Lima. “Hay muchas coincidencias y yo creo que eso es saludable. Respeto la postura del señor Rafael López Aliaga, pero en el momento que él quiera dialogar, las puertas del partido siempre, siempre van a estar abiertas”, añadió. Un día antes, López Aliaga había descartado cualquier reunión con la lideresa fujimorista y afirmó que no tiene “nada que hablar” con ella. Además, cuestionó el encuentro que sostuvo con el expresidente Pedro Pablo Kuczynski. Sin embargo, el líder de Renovación Popular sí mostró afinidad con otras figuras políticas. “Con el señor Alfonso López Chau tengo excelente relación. Es exrector de la UNI. Tiene gente de buen nivel. Con Ricardo Belmont también tengo una excelente llegada”, declaró a Latina TV. En otro momento de la conferencia, Fujimori respondió a la propuesta del candidato de Juntos por el Perú, Roberto Sánchez, quien planteó elevar la remuneración mínima vital a 1.500 soles. “Hemos escuchado muchas medidas populistas, irresponsables también, como querer bloquear las agroexportaciones o intervenir en el Banco Central de Reserva, sacar a Julio Velarde. Por eso son tan importantes los debates, porque va a permitir que la población pueda sacar mejores conclusiones de este intercambio de ideas”, afirmó. La candidata señaló además que los técnicos que participarán en los debates dependerán de los temas que se aborden....

title: الدرعية والعلا يتأهلان إلى نهائي ملحق الصعود المؤهل لروشن
content: انتقلت الإثارة إلى ذروتها في ملحق الصعود لدوري روشن السعودي للمحترفين، حيث شهد يوم الاثنين منافسات حاسمة جمعت بين فرق الدرعية، العلا، الجبلين، والعروبة، ليُحسم خلالها آخر بطاقات الصعود للموسم القادم، وتعززت بذلك تطلعات الجماهير السعودية في متابعة منافسات الدوري الأعلى مستوى. نهائي ملحق الصعود يحدد المتأهل الثالث لدوري روشن السعودي برزت مباراة نصف النهائي بين الدرعية والجبلين كصراع قوي، حيث تمكن الدرعية من الفوز بنتيجة 3-0 على ملعب نادي الشباب بالرياض، بفضل أهداف كلايتون دياندي الذي سجل هدفين خلال الشوط الأول، إضافة إلى هدف عبداللطيف الدوسري الذي اختتم اللقاء، وسط طرد لاعب الجبلين عبدالله الحربي إثر الرجوع لتقنية الـVAR. من جهة أخرى، خطف العلا الأنظار في مواجهة مثيرة أمام العروبة على أرضه في المدينة المنورة، بعدما قلب تأخره بالنتيجة إلى فوز 2-1 في الأشواط الإضافية، ليصبح اللقاء مثالاً حياً للإثارة داخل ملحق الصعود. تفاصيل مباراة الدرعية ضد الجبلين شهد اللقاء بداية حماسية من الدرعية الذي افتتح التسجيل في العشرين دقيقة الأولى عبر المهاجم كلايتون دياندي، مؤكداً تحكم فريقه بالمباراة برأس الحربة الفعالة، إذ أضاف هدفاً ثانياً قبل طرد لاعب الجبلين. وتُوج الأداء القوي بالهدف الثالث قبل نهاية الوقت الأصلي بأربع دقائق، لينهي اللقاء بنتيجة مشابهة لمباراتهما السابقة بالدوري، مما يعكس تحدياً مستمراً بين الفريقين. مواجهة العلا والعروبة: مباراة درامية حتى اللحظات الأخيرة شهد اللقاء تطوراً مثيراً بعد أن تقدم العروبة بهدف المؤجل في الوقت بدل من الضائع من الشوط الأصلي، واستعادت العلا توازنها بسرعة عبر دانيلو باربوسا، لتنتهي المباراة بالتعادل 1-1. وفي الوقت الإضافي، نجح عبدالفتاح آدم في تسجيل هدف الفوز، وسط محاولات مكثفة للعروبة لإحداث التعادل، إلا أن الحارس محمد العويس تصدى لكل الهجمات، ليحجز العلا بطاقة التأهل للنهائي مع الدرعية. موعد النهائي وأهميته للسعودية الرياضية تنتظر الجماهير مباراة السبت 23 مايو على ملعب الدرعية في الرياض، والتي ستشهد صراعاً قوياً بين الدرعية والعلا، لتحديد الفريق الثالث الذي ينضم إلى أبها والفيصلي في دوري روشن السعودي للموسم 2026-2027. وتكتسب هذه المواجهة أهمية كبيرة كرمز للتنافس والاحترافية في كرة القدم السعودية، الأمر الذي يرفع من مستوى الدوري ويزيد من فرص تطوير اللاعبين المحليين. وضحنا لكم عبر محتوى بلس حيث تألق الدرعية والعلا في تحديات ملحق الصعود، مجسدين روح التحدي والإثارة التي تعكس تطور المنافسة في الدوري السعودي، مع ضمان مكان في الدوري الأعلى مستوى للموسم المقبل، مما يجعل هذه المرحلة من أبرز الأحداث الكروية المحلية التي تهم عشاق الكرة السعودية.

title: 2.4L Polo-Powered 1960 Porsche 356B Coupe Emory Outlaw
content: This 1960 Porsche 356B coupe was modified as an Outlaw build by Emory Motorsports in 2009, including the installation of a 2.4L “Polo” flat-four equipped with a custom 911-style case, 3.6L-sourced pistons and cylinders, 911E camshafts, dual 48mm Weber carburetors, twin-plug cylinder heads, a Carrera-style oil tank and cooler, and an MSD ignition controller. The car was repainted Azure Blue and fitted with 16×5.5′′ alloy wheels, a modified 901 five-speed manual transaxle, independent rear trailing arm suspension, front and rear sway bars, and RS 60-style four-wheel annular disc brakes with a dual circuit master cylinder. The interior houses GT-style seats trimmed in red leather along with tan squareweave carpets, a roll bar, and a Nardi steering wheel. This 356B coupe was acquired by the current owner on BaT in June 2024 and is now offered on dealer consignment as part of the Gruppe P, Part X Collection with records from current ownership and a clean North Carolina title. The T5 body was introduced for the 1960 model year with revised front-end styling, including raised bumpers and headlights. This Reutter-built example received a bare-metal repaint in Azure Blue by Emory Motorsports, at which time the floors and longitudinals were replaced and chassis stiffening was added. The hood handle has been deleted, and additional features include dual fender-mounted Raydyot mirrors, a through-hood fuel filler, vent windows, leather hood straps, driving lights, and body-color bumpers. Paint protection film has been added to the hood, nose, bumpers, and wheel arches. The voltage regulator for the windshield wiper motor was replaced in November 2024. The 16×5.5′′ custom alloy wheels that are said to have been built by Chris Coddington feature a brushed finish and were mounted with 195/55 Dunlop Sport tires in December 2024. Annular-type disc brakes have been installed along with a dual circuit master cylinder. Suspension modifications include front and rear sway bars along with an independent 911-style rear trailing arm setup with 27mm torsion bars. The GT-style bucket seats and rear jump seats are upholstered in red leather and tan squareweave carpets cover the floors, seatbacks, and interior panels. Roadster-style door panels and latch-and-link lap belts have been fitted. A roll bar was added under current ownership. The Nardi three-spoke steering wheel frames green-letter VDO instrumentation including a 120-mph speedometer and a tachometer with a 6,800-rpm redline...

En Playas, la gente se queja de la insuficiente recolección de basura y la acumulación de desechos
content: El lío de la basura en Playas El Municipio se hizo cargo de esta labor en diciembre de 2025. La capacidad logística no sería la adecuada para estas tareas. La crisis en la recolección de basura en Playas se profundiza, sin señales claras de solución. Dirigentes barriales, que prefieren mantener su identidad en reserva por temor a represalias, aseguran que el problema se ha vuelto insostenible. “Estamos cansados de soportar la basura y las promesas incumplidas del Municipio . Dijeron que con nuevos recolectores todo mejoraría, pero el tiempo pasa y los problemas aumentan”, expresó Ricardo Cepeda, morador del barrio Ecuador, donde los desperdicios se acumulan en esquinas y espacios públicos. Ecuador Cayambe: Adulta mayor fue víctima mortal de un deslizamiento de tierra durante este lunes Miguel Ángel González La problemática se arrastra desde mayo de 2023, durante la anterior administración municipal. Sin embargo, el actual alcalde, Gabriel Balladares, ofreció solucionar la situación mediante la adquisición de nuevos recolectores, la implementación de un nuevo relleno sanitario y la reorganización del sistema de aseo. En diciembre de 2025, el Municipio asumió directamente el servicio tras la liquidación de la empresa EmaPlayas , con el objetivo de mejorar la recolección. Paralelamente, se han implementado mingas de limpieza, incluso con personal administrativo, pero los habitantes aseguran que los resultados siguen siendo insuficientes. Las quejas por el problema de la basura en Playas Las calles se llenan de desechos en Playas. Néstor Mendoza “Solo el centro de la ciudad está más o menos limpio, pero hay días en que también se acumula la basura , que ahora la recogen en volquetas y en un camioncito viejo de manera antitécnica”, señaló Napoleón Criollo, habitante del centro A esto se suma el cobro directo de la tasa de recolección por parte de la Dirección de Aseo de Calles, tras dejar de hacerlo la Corporación Nacional de Electricidad (CNEL) en octubre del año pasado. Según las autoridades, esta medida permitiría optimizar el servicio y adquirir nuevos equipos, pero la ciudadanía se queja de que la situación de insalubridad persiste. (Lea también | Quito: La percepción del toque de queda en la gente tiene opiniones diferentes a días de terminar) “Nos piden que saquemos la basura en horarios establecidos, pero los carros no pasan con frecuencia. Por eso, la gente se ve obligada a dejar los desechos en las esquinas,...

title: Precio del dólar en México hoy lunes 18 de mayo de 2026
content: Ciudad de México.- El acuerdo comercial entre Washington y Pekín impulsó el optimismo en los mercados, mientras los inversionistas también valoran una posible disminución de las tensiones entre Estados Unidos e Irán . Este escenario ha favorecido una tendencia a la baja en el tipo de cambio USD/MXN , influida principalmente por la debilidad del dólar. Al cierre de la jornada, el dólar estadounidense se ubicó en 17,27 pesos mexicanos , una caída de 0,36 % respecto al cierre previo de 17,33 pesos, de acuerdo con datos de Dow Jones. Aunque en los últimos siete días el dólar acumuló un ligero avance de 0,26 % , en comparación anual mantiene una depreciación de 9,16 % frente al peso mexicano . La paridad cambiaria ha registrado dos jornadas consecutivas de descenso , mostrando presión bajista para la divisa estadounidense. Además, la volatilidad se situó en 5,57 % , por debajo del promedio de referencia de 7,6 %, lo que refleja una relativa estabilidad en el mercado. En el mercado de deuda, el rendimiento del bono del Tesoro de Estados Unidos a diez años rondó el 4,56 % , después de haber alcanzado 4,59 % al cierre de la semana pasada. Este retroceso respondió a una disminución en la preocupación por la inflación global. La moderación en los rendimientos también estuvo relacionada con la caída en los precios del petróleo , luego de que medios iraníes reportaran una propuesta de Estados Unidos para establecer una tregua temporal y reabrir el estrecho de Ormuz . Por otra parte, el índice DXY descendió a 98,98 puntos , su nivel más bajo en dos días, tras registrar la semana anterior su mayor avance en dos meses. El movimiento estuvo respaldado por un mayor optimismo de los inversionistas ante una posible solución al conflicto en Medio Oriente . Los mercados mantienen ahora la atención en los próximos indicadores económicos de Estados Unidos , especialmente después de los recientes reportes de inflación y ante la próxima publicación de las minutas de la Reserva Federal (FOMC) .

title: Riot Games removes Arcane song “Remember Me” featuring D4vd amid first-degree murder case
content: Riot Games has reportedly removed the Arcane soundtrack song “Remember Me” from some of its official music platforms following the criminal case involving D4vd. The track, which featured D4vd as the main singer, was part of the popular Arcane soundtrack connected to Riot Games and Netflix. Fans recently noticed that the song was no longer appearing on certain official Riot music pages and soundtrack listings online. The reported removal comes shortly after D4vd, whose real name is David Anthony Burke, was charged with first-degree murder in Los Angeles. Reports connected the case to the death of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez. According to coverage about the case, the singer has pleaded not guilty, while legal proceedings continue. Since the charges became public, many fans online have discussed whether music companies and streaming platforms would continue promoting songs connected to the artist. Arcane soundtrack featuring D4vd disappears from official Riot platforms Although “Remember Me” has reportedly been removed from some official Riot Games soundtrack pages, the situation does not appear to be fully the same everywhere. Some Spotify users have still been able to find the song through older playlists, archived uploads, or regional versions of the soundtrack. Because of this, fans believe availability may depend on the platform or country they are using. Riot Games is connected to the Arcane soundtrack because the company helped release and distribute the music tied to the hit animated series. This means any removal from official Riot platforms is likely a decision made by rights holders rather than random technical problems. Many online users believe the move is connected to reputational concerns after the serious allegations against D4vd became public. The song itself was tied closely to Arcane, one of Netflix’s biggest animated shows based on the world of League of Legends. The soundtrack became popular among both gamers and music fans, helping several featured artists gain attention online. For now, it remains unclear whether “Remember Me” will return to official platforms in the future or remain unavailable. Fans are also watching to see if other streaming services like Spotify, Apple Music, and YouTube continue distancing themselves from music connected to D4vd while the legal case moves forward. The post Riot Games removes Arcane song “Remember Me” featuring D4vd amid first-degree murder case appeared first on News7tv .

Tift County Schools congratulates teachers on completion of literacy development training
content: TIFTON — Members of the Tift County Board of Education recognized the hard work and achievements of a collection of teachers during their recent May 14 meeting. The school board offered their congratulations to fifteen of the district’s elementary school teachers for their completion of the Lexi Language Essentials for Teachers of Reading and Spelling training, a professional development program aimed at providing improvements to the district’s literacy instruction. Assistant superintendent of Student Services Lee Watson reported that the program was intended to strengthen the teachers’ literacy instruction, supporting their teaching styles with knowledge on how students learn to read and the skills necessary to master reading and writing fundamentals like phonics, vocabulary, and comprehension. Teachers from all four of the school district’s elementary schools took part in the program, Watson said, studying across the span of two years in both online and classroom environments to complete their training. Watson expressed that the Lexi LETRS training would serve as an investment into the teachers’ knowledge and instruction in the hopes of introducing larger shifts and updates to the district’s literacy-focused education.

Neymar aparece comemorando convocação para Copa em live da Kings League
content: Neymar apareceu pela primeira vez nas redes sociais após a convocação para a Copa do Mundo com a Seleção Brasileira. O craque do Santos estava ao lado de Cris Guedes, seu amigo e presidente da Furia FC , que disputa a Kings League. A dupla comemorou se abraçando, e o jogador até mandou um recado, mas o microfone não estava conectado e não foi possível ouvi-lo. Assista: Neymar na live da Kings League comemorando a convocação pra Copa do Mundo! pic.twitter.com/bxFWUEIzhS — DataFut (@DataFutebol) May 18, 2026 A dupla divide a presidência do time. O empresário também é embaixador de jogos online e sócio da sua esposa, a influencer Bianca Coimbra, na marca de água de coco Lynv. Leia mais Vini Jr. celebra convocação para a Copa do Mundo: "Auge da carreira" Álbum da Copa "erra" metade da Seleção convocada por Ancelotti; veja Ancelotti justifica convocação surpresa de Weverton: "Experiência" Neymar na Copa Maior artilheiro da história da Seleção Brasileira em jogos reconhecidos pela Fifa, com 79 gols, Neymar está convocado para disputar a Copa do Mundo de 2026. O atacante do Santos volta ao grupo após dois anos afastado por lesão e tentará liderar o Brasil em sua quarta participação em Mundiais. Fora da Seleção desde 2023, quando sofreu ruptura do ligamento cruzado anterior do joelho esquerdo em jogo contra o Uruguai pelas Eliminatórias, Neymar passou por longo período de recuperação e retornou recentemente ao futebol brasileiro, acumulando 45 jogos, 18 gols e nove assistências nesta nova passagem pelo Santos. Mesmo em fase de reconstrução física, o camisa 10 segue como uma das principais referências técnicas da equipe de Carlo Ancelotti e chega ao Mundial com o peso de ser o jogador mais decisivo da Seleção no século. La Virreina Nacional de la Vendimia confirmó su noviazgo con un jugador de Primera División
content: La Virreina Nacional de la Vendimia, Agustina Giacomelli , confirmó su relación con el futbolista de Gimnasia y Esgrima de Mendoza, Enzo Gaggi . La soberana que representó a Tunuyán en la última Fiesta Nacional compartió imágenes junto al volante del Lobo mendocino, quien actualmente disputa el torneo de la Primera Nacional. Ambos realizaron un posteo colaborativo en las redes sociales que titularon de manera directa: “Mucho amor” . View this post on Instagram La relación rápidamente generó repercusión y comentarios entre los seguidores del fútbol mendocino y el ambiente vendimial. Gaggi es una de las piezas del plantel de Gimnasia, mientras que la joven tunuyanina viene de cumplir con una cargada agenda institucional tras la fiesta de marzo. Ahora, el amor unió ambos mundos. The post La Virreina Nacional de la Vendimia confirmó su noviazgo con un jugador de Primera División appeared first on Diario El Sol Mendoza .

title: Embrace Ancient Chinese Virtues in Pragmatic Play’s Dragon’s Gate – Bonus Choice
content: Pragmatic Play is sending players on a mythical journey, this time to Ancient China, where players can embrace core virtues to win big prizes. Dragon’s Gate – Bonus Choice Metrics Rows: 3 Reels: 5 Paylines: 50 RTP: 96.50% Volatility: Medium Min/max bet: 0.20/240 Max win: 10,000x Mythical Beasts Lead to Prosperity In Dragon’s Gate – Bonus Choice , players will explore a tranquil and beautiful oriental world where balance, prosperity and vitality await. Players will collect symbols representing Chinese coins, mythical carp, pearls, lotus flowers and Chinese maidens in search of wins that can reach up to 10,000x their bet . In addition to that, dragon symbols serve as wilds, allowing players to score the winning combinations with ease and focus. The carp serve as the game’s bonus symbols. In fact, Dragon’s Gate – Bonus Choice boasts three of them, signifying the game’s three virtues – balance, prosperity and vitality. When the red bonus symbol hits during the base game, it gets collected in the red Balance waterfall. The yellow and blue bonus symbols, on the other hand, get collected in the Prosperity and Vitality waterfalls, respectively. Carp That Reach the Top of the Waterfall Turn to Dragons Bonus symbols can randomly trigger the game’s bonus feature with their respective modifiers, or a combination of the three. Landing 4 or 5 bonus symbols triggers the bonus with a guaranteed modifier. Once players trigger the bonus, they are allowed to choose between two distinct bonus rounds. In Free Spins , players get a number of spins where a mystical dragon can randomly bless their reels with extra bonus symbols. Blue bonus symbols can award extra spins, allowing the round to continue. The Respins feature, on the other hand, sees players exclusively collect coin symbols. The round starts with 3 spins, with the counter getting reset each time a coin symbol lands. The dragon is also a participant in this round, awarding a prize boost after every spin. The Balance modifier can expand the bonus game grid to two 5×3 grids. The prosperity modifier adds random wilds or boosts coin values, while the Vitality modifier grants extra spins in Free Spins or increases the spins in Respins to four. Players can trigger Free Spins or Respins with the Buy Bonus feature in markets where this is allowed.

Imprensa internacional reage à convocação de Neymar
content: Rio de Janeiro, RJ, 18 – A presença de Neymar na lista final da seleção brasileira para a Copa do Mundo teve grande repercussão não só no Brasil como também na imprensa internacional. Jornais ao redor do mundo destacaram o a convocação do craque pelo técnico Carlo Ancelotti , que ainda não havia chamado o jogador desde que assumiu o cargo e pôs em dúvida a participação do atacante de 34 anos no Mundial. SURPRESA E BOMBA, NA ESPANHA O diário espanhol “Marca” classificou a convocação de Neymar como “surpresa” e disse que Ancelotti “escutou o Brasil” ao chamar o atacante do Santos. O jornal “As” , também da Espanha, tratou a ida do jogador, a quem chamou de “Rei” , à Copa do Mundo como uma “bomba mundial”. “Toda a nação brasileira explodiu em euforia. Ele sofreu muito, em silêncio, mas o camisa 10 conquistou seu lugar na Copa do Mundo, a última de sua carreira” , escreveu o As. NA FRANÇA, ÚLTIMA DANÇA... O jornal francês “L’Équipe” destacou a convocação do craque como a “última dança ” do camisa 10 pela seleção brasileira. “É uma surpresa que muitos já haviam perdido a esperança: Neymar terá uma última chance com a seleção brasileira. A inclusão do atacante de 34 anos na lista de 26 jogadores, que não atua pela Seleção desde 18 de outubro de 2023 (derrota por 2 a 0 para o Uruguai), foi alvo de intenso debate nos últimos meses.” PARA ARGENTINOS, UM MILAGRE Já o “Olé” , principal diário esportivo da Argentina, tratou como “milagre” a convocação de Neymar para a Copa e afirmou que o atacante poderá ajudar a seleção com a sua experiência. “Num Brasil que, ao contrário de outras épocas, conta com nomes mais acessíveis (excluindo superestrelas como Vinicius e Raphinha), o carismático Neymar contribuirá com sua experiência em jogos desta magnitude. E com sua liderança, mesmo que venha do banco de reservas. Um grande trunfo para Ancelotti, sob qualquer perspectiva, para comandar a equipe diante das adversidades.”
